description_long: This house features a complex, multi-gabled roof structure with steeply pitched wooden shingles and intricate overlapping sections. The exterior is clad in dark wooden planks, giving it a rustic, traditional appearance reminiscent of Eastern European or Alpine architecture. The front facade is dominated by a large covered porch with wooden railings and decorative support beams, flanked by smaller protruding wings. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped in rows and others set individually, framed by simple white trim. The roof includes dormer windows and a central triangular peak, adding to the visual complexity. The overall structure is expansive, with multiple stories and a broad footprint, suggesting a spacious interior.
description: A large, rustic wooden house with steep, multi-gabled shingle roofs, a prominent covered porch, and a complex arrangement of windows and wings.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main entry porch, decorative wooden railings, and the central peaked roof flanked by two side wings.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the house, multiple roof levels, and a series of windows along the lower story.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the broad, steep roof, symmetrical window placement, and the absence of a porch or main entry.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the extended rooflines, side windows, and the overall layered structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Large covered porch with wooden railings, central door, and decorative support beams
